form.formComment: Improved last start with a good run when 3rd (Sr1) over 1720m at Penrith, at the bell was 3rd-2.91 beaten 4.5 m by Lochiel (2:04.00) in NR up to 52 on April 9 at $17. Winning claims.

form.formComment: Last start 5th (Fr1) over 1710m after showing early pace at Goulburn was 4th-5 at the bell, beaten 5 m by Always Be Brendan (2:02.90) in NR up to 47 on March 30 at $11. Before that, 9th (Fr3) over 1770m after showing early speed at this track, well beaten by Highlands Warrior (2:10.80) in NR up to 53 on March 9 at $9. Looking to others.

form.formComment: Fair run when beaten by 3 m finishing fourth after a quick start, behind Spirit Of Sahara at Riverina Paceway over 1740m in a NR up to 53 on February 27 at $4. Then a handy effort when beaten by 7 m finishing third after showing early speed, behind Le Betty at Riverina Paceway over 2270m in a NR up to 58 on March 20 at $34. One of the better chances.

form.formComment: Last start from midfield and won by a nose after showing early speed, (Fr6) at Temora (2:00.70) beating Orsino Belle in 2 WINs on April 6 at $7.50 at the bell was 3rd-3.8. Can be in the finish again.

form.formComment: Didn't do much last time out, was well back in the run when 6th (Fr7) over 1710m at Goulburn, at the bell was 7th-13.1 beaten 13 m by Where Back (2:02.20) in NR up to 62 on March 30 at $61. Before that was driven from back in the field when 9th (Fr5) over 1609m at Menangle, at the bell was 8th-14.85 beaten 13 m by Surf Ace (1:52.70) in NR up to 68 on March 24 at $21. Can do better.

form.formComment: Failed to impress last start; 7th (Sr1) over 1730m at Bathurst, at the bell was 4th-9.65 beaten 11 m by Studleigh Melise (2:03.70) in NR up to 58 on April 8 at $19. Showed ability the outing before when he won by 3 m when driven back in the field, (Fr6) held up early, at Bathurst (2:08.60) beating Babling Babling in NR up to 53 on March 27 at $8.50. Should improve sharply.

form.formComment: Failed to impress last start; 8th (Fr1) over 1609m after showing early pace at Menangle, at the bell was 3rd-3.89 beaten 13 m by Fe Fe On Fire (1:51.80) in NR up to 64 on April 7 at $8.50. Looks wlel placed.

form.formComment: Gave plenty of ground last start when well beaten into eighth after a quick start, behind Helluva at Riverina Paceway over 1740m in a No NR on March 27 at $19. Performed better the start before with a solid effort when 2nd (Sr1) over 1740m at Riverina Paceway was 2nd-0.6 at the bell, beaten 3 m by Ozzie Corka (2:03.90) in NR up to 65 on March 20 at $5.50. Should be in the finish.

Hung in rounding the final turn when under pressure.
Hung outwards around the final turn.
